import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const TrackingSuperAdmin = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('onprogress'); const [trucks, setTrucks] = useState([]); const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState(''); useEffect(() => { const url = `http://localhost:5000/api/trucks?status=${activeTab}${selectedDate ? `&date=${selectedDate}` : ''}`; fetch(url) .then((res) => res.json()) .then((data) => setTrucks(data)) .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch trucks:", err)); }, [activeTab, selectedDate]); return (
{/* Sidebar Super Admin */}

setSelectedDate(e.target.value)} className="border p-2 rounded-lg" />
{/* Truck Cards */}
{trucks.length === 0 ? (

Tidak ada truk dengan status "{activeTab}"

) : ( trucks.map(truck => (

Truck ID: {truck.id}

Truck Type: {truck.type === 'fuso' ? 'Truck Fuso' : 'Dump Truck'}

Driver: {truck.driver}

Status: {truck.status}

Date: {truck.timestamp?.split('T')[0]}

)) )}
); }; export default TrackingSuperAdmin;
